hero.trust_line: Free to join. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

breakfree.title: They charge you 25%. We charge 10%.

card1_items: You pay more, they profit more
card2_items: Full control over your rates & rules
Your guests, your data, your brand
Revenue shared back with the community
breakfree.verdict: Same guests. Same bookings. But this time, YOU keep the profit.

cta_section.title: Ready to own your bookings?

survey.title: Quick Survey
survey.subtitle: Help us build the platform you actually want. Takes 2 minutes.
survey.q1: Which platforms do you currently use?
survey.q2: What commission % do you currently pay?
survey.q3: What frustrates you most about current platforms?
survey.q3_subtitle: Select all that apply — be honest, we're building this for you.

q3_options.price_parity: Price parity rules — can't offer lower prices on your own site
q3_options.no_guest_data: No access to guest data — OTA owns your customers
q3_options.unfair_ranking: Unfair ranking algorithm — pay more to be visible
q3_options.no_brand: No brand visibility — guests think they booked with Booking, not you
q3_options.poor_support: Poor partner support — impossible to reach a human
q3_options.total_dependency: Total dependency — can't survive without them

survey.q4: How interested are you in Staylo? (1 = not at all, 10 = very)
survey.q5: Would you join if commissions were 10% or less?
survey.q6: How many rooms/units do you manage?
survey.success_message: Your feedback is invaluable. Now list your property to secure your founding member spot.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard

vision.title: The Vision
vision.hero_title: A booking platform that belongs to you
vision.hero_subtitle: Staylo isn't just another OTA. It's a platform owned collectively by the hoteliers, restaurants, and experience providers who power it.
vision.ownership_desc: Founding Members don't just use Staylo — they own a piece of it. Revenue is redistributed fairly to the community that generates it.
vision.phase1_desc: Hotels, guesthouses, resorts — fair booking with low commissions
vision.phase2_desc: Restaurants, food experiences — the fair alternative to TheFork & OpenTable
vision.phase3_desc: Activities, tours, wellness, nightlife — experience booking reimagined
vision.phase4_desc: Flights and transfers — completing the travel journey
vision.phase5_desc: Full platform with token governance and global provider ownership
vision.revenue_desc: Traditional platforms charge 15–25%. Staylo charges a flat 10% — and shares a portion back with the community.

founding_benefits.revenue_share: Share of platform revenue proportional to contribution
founding_benefits.governance: Vote on platform decisions and feature priorities
founding_benefits.early_access: Early access to every new feature and market
founding_benefits.badge: Founding Member badge on your property listing

faq.q1: How is Staylo different from Booking.com?
faq.a1: Staylo is owned by its providers, not shareholders. Commissions are 10% instead of 15–25%, and revenue is shared back with the community.
faq.a2: Founding Members participate in revenue sharing and governance decisions. As the platform grows, so does your stake.
faq.q3: When will Staylo launch for travelers?
faq.a3: We're currently onboarding hoteliers. Traveler-facing features launch once we have 500+ verified properties.
faq.q4: Is there a cost to join?
faq.a4: Joining as a Founding Member is completely free during alpha. You only pay commissions when you receive bookings.
faq.a5: We're starting in Southeast Asia (Koh Phangan, Thailand) and expanding globally based on demand.

footer.made_with: Made with purpose for independent hoteliers worldwide.
